headline: Preschool Teacher Salaries Average RM1,400 Below Minimum Wage Compliance
context: Private preschool teachers earn an average of RM1,400 monthly, below the RM1,500 minimum wage, according to 2025 ECCE survey.

cards.big: Private preschool teachers earn average RM1,400 monthly below the RM1,500 minimum wage
cards.sub: ECCE survey of 3,800 teachers reveals widespread labor law non-compliance

cards.big: 67% of private preschools employ teachers without formal early childhood qualifications
cards.sub: Low pay fails to attract trained professionals into the early education sector

cards.big: Malaysia has 32,000 private preschools but labor inspections covered only 2,100 in 2025
cards.sub: Enforcement gaps allow systematic underpayment to continue unchecked

cards.big: Finland requires all preschool teachers to hold a bachelor's degree and pays RM8,500 equivalent
cards.sub: Professional recognition drives quality early childhood outcomes

cards.big: Paying the people who shape young minds less than minimum wage reveals our true education priorities
Should government subsidize private preschool teacher salaries to meet minimum wage requirements
